name: nates-toolkit
description: Standalone, project-agnostic utility skills with no workflow lock-in — plain-language re-explanation (plainspeak), holistic codebase evaluation (repo-eval), agent self-reflection on tool & skill usage (agent-reflection), and skill authoring + quality auditing (write-tool-skill, skill-auditor).

interface.shortDescription: Standalone utility skills, no workflow lock-in
interface.longDescription: A grab-bag of project-agnostic utility skills that stand on their own: plainspeak re-renders the last thing said in vivid plain language; repo-eval scores a codebase across architecture, testing, security, and DX; agent-reflection audits how the agent's own tools and skills performed in a session; write-tool-skill authors distributable skills for external tools and CLIs; skill-auditor audits skill quality against type-specific rubrics.
